rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MIKE ANGEL LEON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver With Pos
rulings.Rulings: *Updated tentative ruling* The hearing on Petitioner's Motion to Appoint Receiver will be continued to Wednesday, November 9, 2022 at 2:00 p.m. All sur-replies must be filed with the court by September 9, 2022. Petitioner's response to any sur-reply must be filed with the court by September 28, 2022.
